# ANALYSIS: RIBBON_GATE_VIX_BAND_ANALYSIS

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  

## Summary  

This analysis requires running a Stage-1 backtest to log VIX at entry for RIBBON_GATE OOS trades and compute win rate (WR) and average P&L per VIX band (LOW<15, MID 15-22, HIGH>22). As of now, the backtest has not been executed, so results are unavailable.  

## Methodology  

Planned methodology:  
- Run Stage-1 backtest on the RIBBON_GATE strategy (as defined in the current production or candidate set) using out-of-sample (OOS) data.  
- For each trade, record the VIX value at the time of entry.  
- Bin trades into three VIX bands: LOW (VIX < 15), MID (15 ≤ VIX ≤ 22), HIGH (VIX > 22).  
- For each band, compute:  
   - Number of trades  
   - Win rate (percentage of trades with positive P&L)  
   - Average P&L per trade  
   - Total P&L  
- Ensure that the backtest uses the same OOS window as used for other candidates in the leaderboard for consistency.

## Interpretation  

Cannot interpret without backtest results. Once the backtest is run, we will look for:  
- Whether the RIBBON_GATE strategy performs better in certain VIX regimes.  
- If there is a significant difference in WR or avg P&L across bands that could inform a VIX-based filter or gate.
